property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Users\cring\scoop\apps\openjdk23\current\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Git\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\usr\bin;C:\Users\cring\bin;C:\Users\cring\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Python314\Scripts;C:\Python314;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\WebDrivers;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\maven\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Users\cring\scoop\apps\openjdk23\current\bin;C:\Users\cring\scoop\shims;C:\Users\cring\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\cring\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\cring\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\cring\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\maven\apache-maven-3.9.14;.

testcase.name: loginWithNonExistentUser_returns401
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: loginWithEmptyFields_showsErrorMessage
testcase.system-err: Mar 28, 2026 11:26:31 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 28, 2026 11:26:31 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.165. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
